“When nothing seems to help, I go and look at a stonecutter hammering away at his rock perhaps a hundred times without as much as a crack showing in it. Yet at the hundred and first blow it will split in two, and I know it was not that blow that did it, but all that had gone before.”

The company we're building
The company we're building
The company we're building
We’re building an environment where exceptional minds can focus on work that truly matters. By bringing together world-class talent under one roof, SEEQC takes on the most complex and consequential challenges in quantum computing—without shortcuts or compromise. 
SEEQC exists to make quantum computing scalable, energy efficient and less expensive.
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/93u49yEe3Y6SULKP86H9kehCi34.png?width=11648&height=8736)
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/93u49yEe3Y6SULKP86H9kehCi34.png?width=11648&height=8736)

Adam Weis, Phd  
Superconducting Test Engineer
## Principles we live by
###### Extreme talent density
Our greatest product isn’t just the systems we engineer, it’s the team we build. If we get the team right, everything else follows. Every person at SEEQC must develop a sharp eye for exceptional talent.
###### Be more interested in learning than being right
No one at SEEQC has all the answers. We prioritize curiosity and growth, embracing feedback as a gift. Radical candor helps us push each other further, challenge directly, and grow together.
###### Bring joy
Find delight in the everyday. Work that feels meaningful should also feel energizing. At SEEQC, we build a culture that sparks curiosity, supports one another, and makes room for joy along the way.
###### Care more
We care deeply about the company we’re building, the products we’re advancing, and the people we work alongside. At SEEQC, caring more than what’s expected isn’t the exception. It is the standard.
###### Build cathedrals, not bricks
We are missionaries, not mercenaries. We choose to take on challenges not because they’re easy, but because they’re meaningful. Every effort connects to the bigger vision of scalable quantum computing.
###### Defy gravity
We believe gravity pulls everyone toward the status quo, and we refuse to go there. At SEEQC, we build teams that push boundaries, support each other, and aim for breakthroughs that reset what’s possible.

People we hire
People we hire
We’re looking for people who want to move the field forward. 
At SEEQC, we seek individuals motivated by shared purpose. Our teams work across disciplines, question first principles, and take on problems that demand depth, design thinking and persistence. If that sounds like you, you’ll find your place at SEEQC.
[Open Positions](https://seeqc.com/careers#job-listings)
Our team comes from some of the leading organizations in the world.
Our team comes from some of the leading organizations in the world.
